title: U.S., other nations back open-source AI with 'strong security' at China summit
summary: Multiple nations including the U.S. endorsed open-source AI development with emphasis on security at an APEC summit in China. The statement marks the first time open-source AI cooperation has been addressed at a ministerial level. This demonstrates growing international consensus on balancing open innovation with security requirements.
content: The APEC statement is the first to include open-source cooperation at a minister level, said Li Lecheng, China's industry and information technology minister.

zh.title: 美国等多国在华峰会上支持具有"强大安全性"的开源AI
zh.summary: 包括美国在内的多个国家在中国举行的亚太经合组织峰会上支持开源AI开发，强调安全性。该声明标志着开源AI合作首次在部长级别被正式讨论。这表明国际社会对于平衡开放创新与安全要求达成了越来越多的共识。

title: Japan core inflation rate in June creeps up from 4-year low as higher oil prices bite
summary: Japan's core inflation rate increased in June, marking the first rise since March as higher oil prices pressured prices upward. The increase aligned with economist expectations of 1.6% growth. The uptick suggests inflation pressures may be returning after Japan's core inflation had reached a 4-year low.
content: This is the first rise in core inflation since March, and was in line with the1.6% growth expected by economists polled by Reuters.

zh.title: 日本6月核心通胀率因油价上升从4年低点反弹
zh.summary: 日本6月核心通胀率上升，这是自3月以来首次上升，较高的油价推高了物价。该增幅与经济学家预期的1.6%增长相符。这一上升表明，在日本核心通胀率跌至4年低点后，通胀压力可能正在回升。

title: U.S. to see higher generic drug prices thanks to tariffs, CEO of leading India pharma firm warns
summary: The CEO of Indian pharmaceutical company Dr Reddy's warned that proposed U.S. tariffs on generic drugs would increase prices for American patients. Generic medications sourced heavily from India would become significantly more costly under the tariff regime. The warning highlights potential consequences of trade policies on affordable medication access.
content: CEO of Indian pharma company Dr Reddy's has warned that Trump's proposed tariffs on generic drugs will make them more expensive for patients.

zh.title: 印度制药公司CEO警告美国关税将导致仿制药价格上升
zh.summary: 印度制药公司Reddy博士的CEO警告称，美国提议的仿制药关税将增加美国患者的药品价格。大量从印度采购的仿制药在关税制度下将变得更加昂贵。这一警告突显了贸易政策对于平价药品可获得性的潜在影响。

title: US imposes tariffs on dozens of trade partners over 'forced labour' imports
summary: The U.S. imposed tariffs on approximately 60 trading partners, citing their failure to adequately prevent imports produced through forced labor. The action represents enforcement of labor standards in international trade. The tariffs affect a broad range of nations and signal increased scrutiny of labor practices in global supply chains.
content: The tariffs target around 60 trading partners over claims they failed to properly stop forced labour.

zh.title: 美国对数十个贸易伙伴征收关税，理由是"强制劳动"进口产品
zh.summary: 美国对约60个贸易伙伴征收关税，理由是这些国家未能充分防止通过强制劳动生产的进口产品。此举代表了对国际贸易中劳动标准的执法。这些关税影响广泛的国家，并反映出对全球供应链中劳动实践的审查力度不断加大。

title: China's largest memory chipmaker sparks fears of a cash drain as it readies for public debut
summary: China's largest memory chipmaker, CXMT, is preparing for a major stock market debut raising concerns about significant capital drain from China's broader equity markets. The blockbuster IPO could redirect substantial investor funds away from other stocks. The listing reflects intense competition in semiconductor manufacturing and strong investor appetite for tech equities.
content: CXMT is stoking fears that its blockbuster stock market debut could pull cash from China's equities.

zh.title: 中国最大的内存芯片制造商在准备公开上市时引发资本流失担忧
zh.summary: 中国最大的内存芯片制造商长江存储正在准备进行大规模股市上市，这引发了对中国更广泛股票市场资本流失的担忧。这个重磅IPO可能会将大量投资者资金从其他股票转向。此次上市反映了半导体制造中的激烈竞争和投资者对科技股的强劲需求。

title: Amazon cracks down on use of AI images by sellers after New York law
summary: Amazon is implementing new restrictions on sellers' use of AI-generated images following a New York law requiring disclosure of synthetic performers in advertisements. The regulation mandates companies reveal when ads feature AI-generated performers instead of real actors. Amazon's enforcement reflects growing regulatory attention to AI-generated content and consumer transparency.
content: A recently enacted New York law mandates that companies disclose when an ad includes a "synthetic performer" in place of a human actor.

zh.title: 纽约法律生效后，亚马逊打击卖家使用人工智能生成的图像
zh.summary: 在纽约州颁布法律要求在广告中披露合成表演者后，亚马逊对卖家使用人工智能生成图像进行了新的限制。该法规要求公司披露广告中何时使用了人工智能生成的表演者而非真人演员。亚马逊的执法反映了监管机构对人工智能生成内容和消费者透明度日益增加的关注。

title: Allianz to buy HSBC’s Singapore insurance unit for $2.09 billion
summary: Allianz announced the acquisition of HSBC's Singapore insurance unit for $2.09 billion, strengthening its presence in the Asia-Pacific region's insurance market. The deal represents a significant strategic expansion for the German insurance company into Singapore's financial services sector. The transaction reflects consolidation trends in Asian insurance markets.
content: Allianz to acquire Singapore insurance business from HSBC

zh.title: 安联以20.9亿美元收购汇丰新加坡保险部门
zh.summary: 安联宣布以20.9亿美元收购汇丰新加坡保险部门，加强了其在亚太地区保险市场的地位。这笔交易代表了这家德国保险公司在新加坡金融服务部门的重大战略扩张。该交易反映了亚洲保险市场的整合趋势。
